reasoning: 90-day achieves 100% but increases false positive risk in production
The only detection miss (Character.AI) had only 1 day between signal and breakout
60-day is the sweet spot: high accuracy without excessive horizon noise

by_category_insights.code-ai: Requires 60+ day horizon for products like Cursor with slow adoption
by_category_insights.video: 100% detection, Kling had shortest lead time (3 days)

recommendations.notes: Use 30-day for time-sensitive alerts, 60-day for standard tracking, 90-day for slow-burn entities

conclusion.answer: The optimal prediction horizon for briefAI signals is 60 days

details.false_positive_tradeoff: 90-day has 100% accuracy in backtest but higher FP risk in production
details.lead_time: Average 10-11 days advance warning regardless of horizon
